AC3: *Send Daily Email* - updates original [+PR1050558-1726+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1726] inactivation email, we will include both 3 month and 12 mos inactivation in one email.
Given I am a Corporate Support team member
When a HPF record is updated to Status = Inactive
OR
HPF is within 3 months from being inactivated (see AC1 for criteria)
Then the system shall send an email with the following information: a report receive an email with a link to a Salesforce report

* Frequency: -Daily (morning 6am)- - Runs after Heather’s BI Batch job runs [+PR1050558-6307+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6307]
* Recipient(s):
** [-QGenda-Credentialing-DQ@scphealth.com-|mailto:QGenda-Credentialing-DQ@scphealth.com] (this is a production email) [DL.SalesforceDQ@scphealth.com|mailto:DL.SalesforceDQ@scphealth.com] (Salesforce Data Quality)
** [+eeinactivations@scphealth.com+|mailto:eeinactivations@scphealth.com] (this is a production email)
** [+inactivations@scphealth.com+|mailto:inactivations@scphealth.com] (this is a production email)
** Account Team Medical Staff Coordinator
** Account Team Clinician Experience Specialist
** Account Team Provider Coverage Coordinator
** Account Team Medical Staff Liaison - CPA
** {color:#0747a6}Account Team Director of Scheduling{color}
** {color:#0747a6}Account Team Credentialing Manager{color}
* Report to include: add link from AC1
* Email details
** Subject: PFA 12 month Inactivation: <insert today’s> (Admin)
** Body:
{color:#bf2600}*_IF YOU HAVE QUESTIONS OR CONCERNS ABOUT DATA REPRESENTED BELOW, PLEASE DO NOT REPLY TO THIS EMAIL, BUT DIRECT THEM TO_*{color} [*_DL.SALESFORCEDQ@SCP-HEALTH.COM_*|mailto:DL.SALESFORCEDQ@SCP-HEALTH.COM]
The following providers were identified as not having worked for the past year and the HPF status has been changed to Inactive.
Please navigate to the following report for additional details {color:#0747a6}+here+{color} {color:#0747a6}<insert link to “Inactive HPF” report> {color}
<insert table/report containing the following information displayed from left to right: HPF (link to HPF record), Facility (link to Service Account), Staffing Team, Clinician (Provider/Practitioner; like to Clinician), Title (Professional Title), Facility Title, Last Date Worked>

{color:#0747a6}The following providers were identified as not having worked for the past 9 months and the HPF status will be changed to “Inactive” when the aging counter reaches 0 (not having worked for the past year).{color}

{color:#0747a6}Please navigate to the following report for additional details {color}{color:#0747a6}+here+{color}{color:#0747a6}<insert link to “3 Month HPF Inactivation” report> {color}
{color:#0747a6}<insert table/report containing the following information displayed from left to right: HPF (link to HPF record), Facility (link to Service Account), Staffing Team, Clinician (Provider/Practitioner; like to Clinician), Title (Professional Title), Facility Title, Last Date Worked, Aging>{color}

Example of email; but follow AC:

!image-20260217-222001.png|width=913,height=183,alt="image-20260217-222001.png"!

AC4: -Once Heather’s job runs to set the Last Date Worked, then trigger the SF Batch ‘DeactivateCliniciansBatch’ job- *– SPLIT TO* [+*PR1050558-6307*+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6307]

----

Note:

* Once the BI batch runs:
** Then our Batch job runs and an Email is generated
*** Only new HPFs processed/meet the report criteria will be in the email, user can click the link to view the full list via the report
*** If no HPF processed/meet the report criteria, then we will still send the email for tracking purposes, but Recipients are ONLY sent to DLs, since there are NO Account Team members will be included.
* Separate story for sending individual HPF inactivation emails since pertains to all HPFs that get inactivated, not just for ones due to 12 mos of inactivity or never worked. [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5863|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5863|smart-link]
* -Existing functionality per story- [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2473|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2473|smart-link] -facility offboarding case, it’s set to “Last Day”- - removing this note, we are NOT going to create facility offboarding cases, we are either going to send an email (what was done for PFA or a notification)
* This story updates [+PR1050558-1580+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1580] & [+PR1050558-1726+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1726]
* {color:#bf2600}*MS will stop their job*{color} [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5376|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5376|smart-link] once our story is in PROD. –{color:#bf2600}*NEED TO NOTIFY MS team to turn off integration*{color}
* *KNOWN LIMITATION:* The max email size is 6MB, if the email size is too large then the email will fail. 		    6 Screenshot 2026-04-02 at 6.36.16 PM.png 26/Mar/26 11:51 AM SCP HC Sprint 14 (Phase 2), SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 15 (Phase 2) 02/Apr/26 8:45 AM 1|i0nzeb: 10/Apr/26 12:05 PM Relates to MS Enhancement = [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5376|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5376|smart-link]. -(Note: Kristi to submit another enhancement request for a new 3 month report)-

As a Data Quality Team member, I want to enhance the Clinician Inactivation process to send a daily email including both HPFs that got inactivated as well as HPFs that are within 3 months of inactivation, so that team members have visibility and can take appropriate action prior to inactivation as needed. I also want to adjust the criteria for auto inactivation, so that we only auto inactive for not working and remove the logic for never worked.

Split story into 3 parts:

# [+PR1050558-5641+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5641] - Covers AC1 - creation of the “3 Month HPF Inactivation” report
# [+PR1050558-6307+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6307] - Covers AC2 & AC4 - Updating the Inactivation Batch Job & when it’s triggered
# [+PR1050558-6314+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6314] - Covers AC3 - Daily Email which includes the “Inactive HPF” & “3 Month HPF Inactivation” reports *(THIS STORY)*

PROD Enhancement: Update the Clinician Inactivation Process & 3 month report - 3 of 3 (Send Daily Email)

None
 
31/Mar/26 8:33 AM Unified Platform Sprint 14 Release In Progress Provider Offboarding Unresolved 06/Apr/26 10:58 AM Critical SCPHealthCloud, SCPProdEnhancement, TADesignComplete David Wilkening   PR1050558-5863, PR1050558-6417, PR1050558-5641, PR1050558-6314 Ashlee Johnson-Savoy Ready for Test ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-6307
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-6309, PR1050558-6310, PR1050558-6312, PR1050558-6313, PR1050558-6430, PR1050558-6431 * 4 new Fields in HPF
** {{Is_Sister_Site_Location__c - Checkbox}} - is true when sister-site links exist for that HPF account
** {{Inactivity_Qualified_270__c - Checkbox}} - is true when crosses over 270 days threshold
** {{Re_Contract__c - Checkbox}}
** {{Aging_Days_Left__c - Number }}
*** calculate inactivity days for current HPF non Sister Location
*** calculate minimum inactivity days across sister sites
*** choose the *minimum of those two* as the merged inactivity duration set {{Aging_Days_Left__c = max(0, 365 - mergedDuration)}}



Logic:

Create a Apex batch job

Sope:

Query all ContactId from HPF where Status NOT IN ('Prospect', 'Candidate', 'Superseded', 'Inactive') AND EffectiveTo == NULL

Execute Scope:

# Query all HPF for the Scope
# Loop through HPF
## Collect Set<Id> → [HPFId]
## Collect Map<PractitionerId, HPF> → [HPF]
## Collect Map<PractitionerId, Set<AccountId> → [PractitionerAccount]
## Collect Map<AccountId> → [ServiceAccountId]
# Utilize the SisterSiteGroupingUtility to get SisterSiteGroup Map<AccountId, String> [accountIdToName];
# Query Contract record for using [HPFId] Query: Select Contract.AccountId, Contract.Employment_Type__c, Min(Contract.Initial_Effective_Date__c) From PNC Where Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c = [HPFId] Group by Contract.AccountId, Contract.Employment_Type__c
## Loop through and collect Map<ClinicianId, Map< Employment_Type__c, Initial_Effective_Date__c>> *[ContractEffectiveDate]*
# Loop Through the [HPF] in Scope *COLLECTING DATES FOR SISTER SITES*
## If [HPF.|http://HPF.id]Id in [accountIdToName]
## Build a Map<ClinicianId, Map<SisterSiteGroupName, LastWorked> *[ClinicianSisterLastWorked]*
### Compare if there is already a LastWorked for the SisterSiteGroupName and if Loop.LastWorked > value in [ClinicianSisterLastWorked] then update [ClinicianSisterLastWorked].LastWorked = Loop.LastWorked
## Build a Map<ClinicianId, Map<SisterSiteGroupName, NextScheduledDate> *[ClinicianSisterNextScheduledDate]*
### Compare if there is already a NextScheduledDate for the SisterSiteGroupName and if Loop.NextScheduledDate > value in [ClinicianSisterNextScheduledDate] then update [ClinicianSisterNextScheduledDate].NextScheduledDate = Loop.NextScheduledDate
## Build a Map<ClinicianId, Map<SisterSiteGroupName, HospitalPrivilegedDate> *[ClinicianSisterHospitalPrivilegedDate]*
### Compare if there is already a HospitalPrivilegedDate for the SisterSiteGroupName and if Loop.HospitalPrivilegedDate > value in [ClinicianSisterHospitalPrivilegedDate] then update [ClinicianSisterHospitalPrivilegedDate].HospitalPrivilegedDate = Loop.HospitalPrivilegedDate
# Loop Through the [HPF] in Scope
## If HPF is Part of Sister Site
### Compare using [ClinicianSisterLastWorked], [ClinicianSisterNextScheduledDate], [ContractEffectiveDate], [ClinicianSisterHospitalPrivilegedDate]
### Based on comparison result stamp Is_Sister_Site_Location__c, Aging_Days_Left__c for each HPF
### If the Date crossed 270 then set
#### Inactivity_Qualified_270__c = Y
#### Re_Contract__c = Y
### If Date Crossed 365 then
#### Status = Inactive
#### Credentialing Status = Inactive
#### Contracting Status = ‘Terminated’
#### Termination Date = <day the automation ran>
#### Inactive Reason = ‘Provider Inactivity >12 Months'
#### Effective To = <set to 365 days from the 'Last Date Worked'>
####* If HPF’s ‘Last Date Worked’ is blank, then set to 365 days from the ‘Initial Effective Date’ (Clinician Contract)
####* If Clinician Contract’s ‘Initial Effective Date’ is blank, then set to 365 days from the HPF’s 'Hospital Privileged Date' 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: -Create a- *-report-* -for- *-HPFs where “Last Date Worked” is more than 9 Months (270 days)-* *- SPLIT TO* [+*PR1050558-5641*+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5641]


AC2: Updates original story [+PR1050558-1580+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1580] - update Batch to only inactive an HPF (include checking Sister Sites). Updates to the original stories in {color:#0747a6}blue{color}.
Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I view a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record *where the following is true:*

* If the HPF Status is not Prospect, Candidate, Superseded or Inactive
* {color:#0747a6}AND the HPF’s “Effective To” = Blank{color}
* *A clinician hasn’t worked in a year*:
** ‘Last Date Worked’ (HPF) is more than 12 months (365 days) away for all sister sites{color:#0747a6}*{color} that a clinician works at (Account field on HPF where status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive)
* *A clinician has never worked*:{color:#0747a6} {color}
** -If Last Date Worked (HPF) is blank, check the Company Signed Date (on Clinician Contract, aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites-
{color:#0747a6}If ‘Last Date Worked’ (HPF) is blank and ‘Initial Effective Date’ (Clinician Contract){color}{color:#403294} {color}{color:#0747a6}more than 12 months (365 days) away for this HPF as well as for all sister sites{color}{color:#0747a6}***{color}
{color:#0747a6}OR{color}
** If ‘Last Date Worked’ (HPF) and {color:#0747a6}‘Initial Effective Date’ (Clinician Contract){color} are both blank, and the ‘Hospital Privileged Date’ (HPF) is more than 12 months {color:#0747a6}(365 days){color} away{color:#0747a6} {color}for all sister sites{color:#0747a6}***{color}

{color:#0747a6}*{color}{color:#0747a6}*Sister Sites*{color}{color:#0747a6}: To find Sister Sites, navigate to the Service Account’s ‘Sites’ tab, a linked Service Accounts are considered 'Sister Sites'. Then check those Service Account(s) for HPF in Status ≠ Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive that are related to the Clinician. {color}

Then the HPF record is automatically updated with the following:

* Status = Inactive
* Credentialing Status = Inactive
* Contracting Status = ‘Terminated’
* Termination Date = <{color:#0747a6}day the automation ran {color}-date when Last Date Worked is more than 12 months away->
* {color:#0747a6}Inactive Reason = ‘Provider Inactivity >12 Months' {color}
* Effective To = <set to 365 days from the 'Last Date Worked'>
** {color:#0747a6}If HPF’s ‘Last Date Worked’ is blank, then set to 365 days from the ‘Initial Effective Date’ (Clinician Contract){color}{color:#403294} {color}
** {color:#0747a6}If Clinician Contract’s ‘Initial Effective Date’ is blank, then set to 365 days from the HPF’s 'Hospital Privileged Date'{color}

{color:#0747a6}If {color}{color:#0747a6}*ALL*{color}{color:#0747a6} related HPF’s are in Status = Inactive, then update “E-Verify Status” field to {color}{color:#0747a6}-I-9-{color}{color:#0747a6} {color}{color:#0747a6}-Status is-{color}{color:#0747a6} blank. DO NOT update the ‘I-9 Status’.{color}

{color:#0747a6}If {color}{color:#0747a6}*ALL*{color}{color:#0747a6} related HPF’s are in Status = Inactive, then for {color}all open cases, child cases, tasks related child cases, & tasks related to the clinician are updated to Status = Closed{color:#0747a6}, Closed Reason = Canceled {color}- Original story{color:#403294} {color}[PR1050558-2436: Enhanced Clinician Inactivation: Case and Task Closure|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2436]


AC3: *-Send Daily Email-* -- updates original- [+-PR1050558-1726-+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1726] -inactivation email, we will include both 3 month and 12 mos inactivation in one email-. - *SPLIT TO* [+*PR1050558-6314*+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6314]


AC4: Once Heather’s job runs to set the Last Date Worked, then trigger the SF Batch ‘DeactivateCliniciansBatch’ job
Given I am a System Administrator within the Corporate Support Apps
When the BI job to set the ‘Last Date Worked' completes
Then, the SF Batch ‘DeactivateCliniciansBatch’ job shall run to ensure when new information is received our job will run.

----

Note:

* Separate story for sending individual HPF inactivation emails since pertains to all HPFs that get inactivated, not just for ones due to 12 mos of inactivity or never worked. [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5863|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5863|smart-link]
* -Existing functionality per story- [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2473|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2473|smart-link] -facility offboarding case, it’s set to “Last Day”- - removing this note, we are NOT going to create facility offboarding cases, we are either going to send an email (what was done for PFA or a notification)
* This story updates [+PR1050558-1580+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1580] & [+PR1050558-1726+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1726]
* {color:#bf2600}*MS will stop their job*{color} [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5376|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5376|smart-link] once our story is in PROD. –{color:#bf2600} *NEED TO NOTIFY MS team to turn off integration*{color} 		    4 Screenshot 2026-04-07 at 2.36.35 PM.png 26/Mar/26 11:51 AM SCP HC Sprint 14 (Phase 2), SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 15 (Phase 2) 03/Apr/26 1:14 AM 1|i0nzc3: 10/Apr/26 12:05 PM Relates to MS Enhancement = [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5376|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5376|smart-link]. -(Note: Kristi to submit another enhancement request for a new 3 month report)-

As a Data Quality Team member, I want to enhance the Clinician Inactivation process to send a daily email including both HPFs that got inactivated as well as HPFs that are within 3 months of inactivation, so that team members have visibility and can take appropriate action prior to inactivation as needed. I also want to adjust the criteria for auto inactivation, so that we only auto inactive for not working and remove the logic for never worked.

Split story into 3 parts:

# [+PR1050558-5641+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5641] - Covers AC1 - creation of the “3 Month HPF Inactivation” report
# [+PR1050558-6307+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6307] - Covers AC2 & AC4 - Updating the Inactivation Batch Job & when it’s triggered *(THIS STORY)*
# [+PR1050558-6314+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6314] - Covers AC3 - Daily Email which includes the “Inactive HPF” & “3 Month HPF Inactivation” reports

PROD Enhancement: Update the Clinician Inactivation Process & 3 month report - 2 of 3 (Inactivation Batch Job)

None
 
25/Mar/26 4:33 AM Unified Platform Sprint 14 Release In Progress Provider Onboarding Unresolved   Critical HyperCareReleaseEligible, SCPHealthCloud, SCPPRODTicket, TADesignComplete Nate Hilburger   PR1050558-5869, PR1050558-5873, PR1050558-6082, PR1050558-6237, PR1050558-1723, PR1050558-6382, PR1050558-3573 harshgupta Ready for Test ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-6260
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-6261, PR1050558-6284, PR1050558-6392, PR1050558-6393 AC1: Create a new Email Template for *mySCP Instructions Email*, update verbiage for Locum, Leased, & Managed



AC2, AC3, AC4: Update the Record Trigger Flow HPFScheduledPathFlows

When HPF Facility Title Employment Type from Code Set = [Locum or Leased or Managed] and “Prescreen Level 2 Completed” != null and isCHGNED from NULL

# Query for User Record for the Clinician Record (from HPF.PractitionerId)
## If User Do Not Exists
### Create the User Records (Do NOT Check: Generate new password and notify user immediately)
#### On Failure of Creation of User Record Create Task as per AC3
#### On Successful user Created send Email as per AC1
### Check for the fields Social Security Number, Zipcode (Mailing Address), Mobile is NUL
#### In ANY Field has NULL: Create Task as per AC4
#### If all fields are available then send the Platform Event ({{Clinician_Onboarding__e}}) with fields as per HPFScheduledPathFlows
## If User Exists and in Active Flag = False
### Update the User to be Active = True
### send Email as per AC1
# Check for the fields Social Security Number, Zipcode (Mailing Address), Mobile is NUL
## In ANY Field has NULL: Create Task as per AC4
## If all fields are available then send the Platform Event ({{Clinician_Onboarding__e}}) with fields as per HPFScheduledPathFlows



AC5: On Closure of Task

* Task Record Type = Default
* Type = Okta Integration Failure (*NEW*)

Trigger a Platform Event {{Clinician_Onboarding__e}} with fields as per HPFScheduledPathFlows & Add Source (Source__c) [Type Text] field to platform event {{Clinician_Onboarding__e}}to determine the flow(s) path to correct business logic 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project *AC1:* Split to story [+PR1050558-5873+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5873]

*AC2:* *Auto* process for creating a User & trigger Okta Integration
Given I am an Active Clinician with a person account record
When a Clinician contract record Status = Executed
And -Contract’s- HPF Facility Title's Employment Type = ‘Locum’ or ‘Leased’ or ‘Managed’
And at least ONE related HPF records has field = ‘Prescreen Level 2 Completed’ populated
Then the system shall *auto create a user record* (see original story [+PR1050558-1789+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1789] & Security Matrix for User Setup of Persona = Applicant/Prospect Clinician/ Reserved for Internal Employees)
And when creating the user, the system shall *NOT generate the welcome email* (link to login to Core Connect portal)
And once the *user is successfully created*, the system shall *trigger the Platform Event for Okta Integration*

*AC3:* *Manual* process for creating a User & trigger Okta Integration
Given I am an Active Clinician with a person account record
When a Clinician contract record Status = Executed
And Contract’s Employment Type = ‘Locum’ or ‘Leased’ or ‘Managed’
And at least ONE related HPF records has field = ‘Prescreen Level 2 Completed’ populated
And the system *failed to auto create a user record*
Then the system shall automatically *create a task for the Data Quality team*:

* Task Record Type = Default
* Type = Okta Integration Failure (*NEW*)
* *Subject = Manually ‘Enable Customer User’
* *Assigned To = Data Quality (queue)
* Comment =
1. Navigate to the Clinician’s record
2. Ensure the following fields are populated:
2a. Social Security Number
2b. Zipcode (Mailing Address)
2c. Mobile
3. Then select ‘Enable Customer User’
4. Before you click ‘Save’:
4a. Profile = ‘Core HC Customer Community Plus Login User’
4b. Complete all required fields (marked in red)
-4c. Uncheck ‘Generate new password and notify user immediately’ (located at the bottom of the page)-
* *Status = Open
* Due Date =
* *Priority = Normal
* Name = <Clinician>
* Related To =

And once the user is created, the system shall *NOT generate a Welcome Email* based if the following criteria is met:

* Clinician contract record Status = Executed
* And Contract’s Employment Type = ‘Locum’ or ‘Leased’ or ‘Managed’
* And at least ONE related HPF records has field = ‘Prescreen Level 2 Completed’

And *Task is Closed (Status = Completed,* with assumption that a user was created), the system shall *trigger the Platform Event for Okta Integration*



*AC4:* Create Task if Platform Event for Okta Integration failed due to missing Clinician Info
Given the criteria was met to create a Platform Event for Okta Integration (Platform Event, Name = Clinician Onboarding)
And the system failed to create due to missing Clinician information (SSN (last 4), Zipcode (Mailing Address), or Mobile)
Then the system shall automatically *create a task for the Data Quality team*:

* Task Record Type = Default
* Type = Okta Integration Failure (*NEW*)
* *Subject = Update Clinician Information to unblock the Okta Integration
* *Assigned To = Data Quality (queue)
* Comment =
1. Navigate to the Clinician’s record
2. Ensure the following fields are populated:
2a. Social Security Number
2b. Zipcode (Mailing Address)
2c. Mobile
3. Close Task with Status = ‘Completed’ to trigger the Okta Integration.
* *Status = Open
* Due Date =
* *Priority = Normal
* Name = <Clinician>
* Related To =

And *Task is Closed (Status = Completed,* with assumption that a user record exists), the system shall *trigger the Platform Event for Okta Integration*


*AC5:* -Okta Integration updates – Platform Event, Name = Clinician Onboarding-- – *SPLIT to NEW STORY* [+*PR1050558-6237*+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6237]

NOTES:
Data Quality or Clinician Experience Specialist have access to create the User record via ‘Enable Customer User’ button.

Welcome Email (story [+PR1050558-4894+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-4894]), should *still be generated when*:

* Auto creation - ATS Applicant Status = Awaiting Intake Form (1789)
* Manual creation - ‘Enable Customer User’ (811)
** Criteria in this story is NOT met:
Clinician contract record Status = Executed
And Contract’s Employment Type = ‘Locum’ or ‘Leased’ or ‘Managed’
And at least ONE related HPF records has field = ‘Prescreen Level 2 Completed’ populated 		    5 Outlook-A blue cir.png 23/Mar/26 10:26 AM SCP HC Sprint 14 (Phase 2), SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 15 (Phase 2) 25/Mar/26 1:29 PM 1|i0kny0:zzzv 20/Apr/26 9:51 AM Locums clinicians are receiving welcome emails as intended; however, because they do not complete intakes nor do they provide the necessary information in an agreement- they are reaching out to the CET because they are not receiving okta.

Locums will not have a CES as they should be going through their agency and then to HWL platform for communication. We need to remove them from the welcome email, or find an alternate solution to allow them access to the portal without providing the appropriate level details.

*Business Impact:*

Locum clinicians are confused about the multiple touchpoints, they cannot receive OKTA since they have no info provided, locums are not managed by the CES, and all communication for locum should go through HWL.



*Split story into 3 parts:*

# [+PR1050558-5873+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5873] - Covers AC1 - New mySCP Instruction email template and triggering logic for Employment Type = Locum, Leased, or Managed.
# [+PR1050558-6260+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6260] - Covers AC2-AC4 - Auto & Manual process for creating a User & trigger Okta Integration. Also covers task creation if Platform Event for Clinician Onboarding is NOT successfully created. *[THIS STORY]*
# [+PR1050558-6237+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6237] - Covers AC5 - Okta Integration updates (Platform Event, Name = Clinician Onboarding)

PROD Enhancement: UPHypercare311 - Remove Locum clinicians from the welcome email - 2 of 3

None

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-6283, PR1050558-6390, PR1050558-6391 Update Scheduled Path Flow : HPFScheduledPathFlows

Update the Flow to Run only when Facility Title’s (using Code Set) Employment Type = ‘Employee’ or ‘Independent Contractor’ or ‘Partner’ 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project *AC1*: Split to story [+PR1050558-5873+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5873]

*AC2 - AC4*: Split to story [+PR1050558-6260+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6260]



*AC5:* *Okta Integration updates* - Platform Event, Name = Clinician Onboarding
Given I am an Integration User in the HC org (updates AC4 within story [+PR1050558-3573+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3573]+,+ updates in {color:#403294}purple{color})
When a Contract record where Record Type = ‘Clinician’
AND contract Status = ‘Executed’
{color:#403294}And Contract’s Employment Type = ‘Employee’ or ‘Independent Contractor’ or ‘Partner’ (should match HPF Facility Title Code Set Employment Type){color}
AND contract’s related HPFs Provider System Status = ‘Active’ or ‘Candidate’ (sent every time this criteria is met. MuleSoft will determine which Okta API to call)
Then the system shall create the following record:

* Platform Event, Name = Clinician Onboarding
** Global Provider Id
** SSN (last 4 digits)
** Zipcode (Mailing Address)
** Phone (Mobile)
** Fed ID (-add- User ‘Federation ID’)
*** -IF blank, set as null- 		16/Apr/26 9:20 AM   6 Screenshot 2026-04-07 at 1.22.52 PM.png 18/Mar/26 12:30 PM SCP HC Sprint 14 (Phase 2), SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 15 (Phase 2) 18/Mar/26 12:30 PM 1|i0knxs:zzzzr 16/Apr/26 9:20 AM Locums clinicians are receiving welcome emails as intended; however, because they do not complete intakes nor do they provide the necessary information in an agreement- they are reaching out to the CET because they are not receiving okta.

Locums will not have a CES as they should be going through their agency and then to HWL platform for communication. We need to remove them from the welcome email, or find an alternate solution to allow them access to the portal without providing the appropriate level details.

*Business Impact:*

Locum clinicians are confused about the multiple touchpoints, they cannot receive OKTA since they have no info provided, locums are not managed by the CES, and all communication for locum should go through HWL.

*Split story into 3 parts:*

# [+PR1050558-5873+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5873] - Covers AC1 - New mySCP Instruction email template and triggering logic for Employment Type = Locum, Leased, or Managed.

1|i0mird: 03/Mar/26 5:50 AM *Submitter:* Murphy Alkhatib

*Role:* Recruiter

*Description:* 

In this instance, the NP has an existing contract with us from the old system. They are PT at all sites, but moving to FT at Memorial. However, when requesting a new agreement, it is pulling only PT rates (pictures attached)

*Steps to Reproduce:*

Generate agreement, select all sites, generate rates for Memorial

*Expected vs. Actual:*

Expect to see FT rates for Memorial due to having a FT HPF, but only see PT. This is causing an issue with the blended rate as well.

Note: this is not the only agreement this is happening to.

*Record Link:* 

[https://corehc.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800Ps00001HHiokIAD/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001Ps00001KldSaIAJ%2Fview|https://corehc.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800Ps00001HHiokIAD/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001Ps00001KldSaIAJ%2Fview]

*Business Impact:*

This is an understaffed site and we have been on hold getting this agreement out for 2 weeks. This impacts the clinician and the facility

 Robert Christensen Data Issue

The Rates (Qgenda Scheduling Setup) event should come to MuleSoft only after the Credential Status is Active or Schedule Pending on HC. As per discussion with Nick & Ron on 26th Feb, the Credential Status for the corresponding contract (800Ps00001GEPzMIAX) was not in Active and MuleSoft received the event. 		0 Robert Christensen 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 03/Mar/26 12:30 PM   7 image-20260226-180953.png 26/Feb/26 11:29 AM SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3) 26/Feb/26 1:11 PM
Data: Data Migration Errors
1|i0mai5: 02/Apr/26 6:41 AM *Submitter:* Ron Gregg

*Role:* IT

*Description:* 

The QGENDA_SCHEDULING_SETUP integration is getting triggered too early. We're seeing this happen on contract execution where its expected to trigger on Credentialing Status = 'Active' OR 'Scheduled Pending'. There would not be a case where we want this to happen on contract execution as they need to go through the credentialing process even if they're rehired.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

"Here's an example payload from a failed Integration Log and sample IDs that also failed:

{
      "data": {
            "schema": "iuzH21J_jRy4V6JhzAunMg",
            "payload": {
                  "ContractId__c": "800Ps00001GEPzMIAX",
                  "InactiveDate__c": null,
                  "CreatedById": "005Ps00000JUmqjIAD",
                  "Type__c": "Rate for HPF",
                  "HPFId__c": "0bSPs000001b3WQMAY",
                  "CreatedDate": "2026-02-25T09:22:36.358Z",
                  "FirstScheduledDate__c": null,
                  "GlobalFacilityId__c": 496165,
                  "GlobalProviderId__c": 806888
            },
            "event": {
                  "EventUuid": "79ec9410-39a1-4ee6-b8c3-300f8f09de46",
                  "replayId": 5763541,
                  "EventApiName": "HPFUpdates__e"
            }
      },
      "channel": "/event/HPFUpdates__e"
}

{ "staffId": "806888", "locationId": "496165" }
{ "staffId": "806888", "locationId": "495140" }
{ "staffId": "272142", "locationId": "496219" }
{ "staffId": "806888", "locationId": "496164" }
{ "staffId": "272142", "locationId": "496223" }
{ "staffId": "80204", "locationId": "1491" }
{ "staffId": "272142", "locationId": "497001" }"


*Expected vs. Actual:*

The trigger would fire on Credentialing Status change instead of contract execution. The process was setup to trigger on Credentialing Status and we do have successful calls, but these failed ones are happening on Contract Execution.

*Record Link:* 

N/A

*Business Impact:*

Producing errors when the event shouldn't have triggered. Could prevent pay rates from going to QGenda Scheduling which would cause Payroll issues.

PROD Bug: UPHypercare340 - QGenda Scheduling Event Firing Too Early

None

No permission
 Robert Christensen PR1050558-6473, PR1050558-6522, PR1050558-6587, PR1050558-6588 *AC1 - Update rate display layout*

• DataRaptor (loads PCA records into Summary tab) -- add Previous_Rate__c, Facility_Level_Rate__c, Unit_of_Measure__c, Time_Type__c to extract output for UI Card

• OmniUI Card SpecifyRates_SummaryContractScreen (new version) -- update rate card template to display 4 lines per approved mock: header shows Facility Title (and Time Type for NPPA if populated), followed by Current rate + UoM, Previous rate + UoM (blank if none), and Facility rate + UoM. Format currency as $X.XX

• GetContractRates.cls -- add Previous_Rate__c, Facility_Level_Rate__c, Unit_of_Measure__c, Time_Type__c to SOQL queries on lines 10 and 14

• For the FLS, verify Clinician Contracting PSG has Read access on PreventiveCareAgreement.Previous_Rate__c and PreventiveCareAgreement.Facility_Level_Rate__c if not present please add to permission set

*AC2 - Rate change comparison + strikethrough (preferred option)*

• In OmniUI Card template, add conditional CSS to rate + UoM only

• If Previous_Rate__c is not blank, compare Rate__c vs Previous_Rate__c; if different, strikethrough Previous rate [$X.XX only] + UoM; if same, no strikethrough

• If Previous_Rate__c is blank, compare Rate__c vs Facility_Level_Rate__c; if different, strikethrough Facility rate + UoM; if same, no strikethrough 		0 Robert Christensen 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Update the how the Rates are displayed on the Summary Tab
Given I am a Recruiter or Clinician Contracting Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When I am viewing a Clinician Contract in any Status
Then on the Summary tab, I can see the following information displayed for each rate (Preventive Care Agreement) record: (see mocks below)

* *First Line:* <Facility Title> | <Time Type>
** Only display “| <Time Type>” if time type if available
* *Second Line*: Current: <Rate> <Unit of Measure> (Display in bold)
* *Third Line*: Previous: <Previous Rate> <Unit of Measure>
* *Forth Line:* Facility: <Facility Level Rate> <Unit of Measure>

AC2: Update how the system compares/determines change in Rates for Clinician Contracts

Given I am a Recruiter or Clinician Contracting Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When I am on a Clinician Contract
Then on the Summary tab, the system will identify if there is a rate change by comparing:

* Clinician’s current rate (field = ‘Rate’) to previous rate (field = ‘Previous Rate’, populate via the cloning process)
*OR* if ‘Previous Rate’ is blank, then
* Clinician’s current rate (field = ‘Rate’) to the facility rate (field = ‘Facility Level Rate’, rate from most relevant Practice Operation contract)

And if a rate change is detected (over or under rate), then the system shall: {color:#403294}*(BASED ON SOLUTION DESIGN, update AC, able to do preferred.)*{color}

* For cloned rates: Cross out/strikethrough the previous rate & unit of measure listed in “Previous”
* For newly added rates: Cross out/strikethrough the facility rate & unit of measure listed in “Facility”
* {color:#403294}-next best: Cross out/strikethrough the whole 3rd line (Previous: <Previous Rate> <Unit of Measure>)-{color}
* {color:#403294}-last option: No cross out/strikethrough- {color}

----

NOTES and Mocks for different options:

!image-20260416-144121.png|width=771,alt="image-20260416-144121.png"!



!image-20260416-144305.png|width=765,alt="image-20260416-144305.png"!



!image-20260302-193012.png|width=961,height=183,alt="image-20260302-193012.png"!

Reviewed options with Matt on 3/3/26. Wants to move forward with *displaying all 3 types of rates*, so it’s clear to the user, what is new, what was cloned and the different rates. Below is mock of the new layout for rates with 3 options for how to display Rate Changes. Matt prefers to have some sort of *indicator of a rate change –* cross out the rate if there is difference between the Current Clinician’s Rate and the Previous Rate (for cloned rate) OR Current Clinician’s Rate and the Facility Rate (newly added rate)

Also note that for NPPA Facility Titles we are displaying the *<Facility Title | Time Type>*. Example below is for Non-NPPA, so no time type in mock.

!image-20260303-214828.png|width=948,height=183,alt="image-20260303-214828.png"! 		    7 image-20260302-193012.png 25/Feb/26 11:13 PM SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 15 (Phase 2) 26/Feb/26 5:13 AM 1|i0mh9d: 20/Apr/26 8:02 AM *Submitter:* Matthew Hebert

*Role:* Clinician Contracting Specialist

*Description:* 

Syed Tayyab-Contract No. 00471798. As a specialist viewing a contract record submitted by a recruiter, under the Summary tab there is no visual indication that a rate is new from the rate identified on the Previous (Executed) Contract. It seems to indicate that nothing has changed for that site when there are numerous changes

*Steps to Reproduce:*

Navigate to Syed Tayyab Person account. Navigate to the Agreements Tab. Select the approved Contract. Click the link to open the Previous Contract to open side by side with the new. Navigate to the Summary Tab on both. Compare the rates listed on each and compare. Note that there is no visual clue as to what is new and what is carried over.


*Expected vs. Actual:*

The rates that are crossed out do not seem to indicate that the rate changed. I also expected there to be a visual indicator of what was carried over and what was new

*Record Link:* 

[https://corehc.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800Ps00001GDU0AIAX/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001Ps00001KlY3eIAF%2Fview|https://corehc.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800Ps00001GDU0AIAX/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001Ps00001KlY3eIAF%2Fview]

*Business Impact:*

Cannot tell what is new and needs a new agreement or what is still the same without making a line by line comparison.

27/Feb/26 1:27 PM   In Progress Unresolved   Medium SCPDataMigration, SCPHypercareBug, SCPPRODTicket, SCPWaitingOnIT, SCPWork   PR1050558-4980, PR1050558-5090 Brou, James On Hold ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-5918
No permission
 Robert Christensen 0 Robert Christensen Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project     3 HPF Dates 20260225.png 25/Feb/26 3:33 PM SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3) 26/Feb/26 9:39 AM 1|i0mgfd: 10/Mar/26 1:05 PM *Submitter:* Heather Clavier

*Role:* Legal – Client Contracting

*Description:* 

I'm finding multiple HPFs with the same either EffectiveFrom or EffectiveTo date
SELECT a.Global_Facility_ID__c, a.Name, c.Global_Provider_ID__c, MIN(hpf.Status__c) MinStatus, MAX(hpf.Status__c)MaxStatus, MIN(hpf.EffectiveFrom)MinEffFrom, MAX(hpf.EffectiveFrom) MaxEffFrom, hpf.EffectiveTo, c.Name, COUNT(1)
FROM UnifiedPlatformData.COREHC.HealthcarePractitionerFacility hpf JOIN
UnifiedPlatformData.COREHC.Account a with(nolock) ON [a.id|http://a.id] = hpf.AccountId JOIN
UnifiedPlatformData.COREHC.Contact c with(nolock) ON [c.id|http://c.id] = hpf.PractitionerId
GROUP BY a.Global_Facility_ID__c, a.Name, c.Global_Provider_ID__c, c.Name, hpf.EffectiveTo
HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
ORDER BY c.name, a.name

SELECT a.Global_Facility_ID__c, a.Name, c.Global_Provider_ID__c, MIN(hpf.Status__c) MinStatus, MAX(hpf.Status__c)MaxStatus, hpf.EffectiveFrom, MIN(hpf.EffectiveTo) MinEffTo, MAX(hpf.EffectiveTo) MaxEffTo, c.Name, COUNT(1)
FROM UnifiedPlatformData.COREHC.HealthcarePractitionerFacility hpf JOIN
UnifiedPlatformData.COREHC.Account a with(nolock) ON [a.id|http://a.id] = hpf.AccountId JOIN
UnifiedPlatformData.COREHC.Contact c with(nolock) ON [c.id|http://c.id] = hpf.PractitionerId
GROUP BY a.Global_Facility_ID__c, a.Name, c.Global_Provider_ID__c, c.Name, hpf.EffectiveFrom
HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
ORDER BY c.name, a.name

*Steps to Reproduce:*

Using the replicated data, query was included above.


*Expected vs. Actual:*

It's expected that there are no overlapping HPF dates

*Record Link:* 

Not Provided

*Business Impact:*

Reporting / Integrations may pull back multiple HPFs

PROD Bug: UPHypercare332 - Multiple HPFs with the same EffFrom or EffTo Date

None

Not Provided

This notification should only trigger for an Employed Clinician and only when the field is updated, not originally populated.

When working with a Healthcare Practitioner Facility (HPF) record
Then for field = ‘Time Type' available picklist values are: (changing existing value from “On Call” to “On-Call”)

|Full Time|Full Time|

|Locum|Locum| 		05/Mar/26 3:10 PM   6 image-20260305-201007.png 25/Feb/26 2:55 PM SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 12.6 (R4) 26/Feb/26 9:17 AM 1|i0mfq9: 05/Mar/26 3:10 PM Given I am an Integration User, for HPF field = ‘Time Type' expected value should be ‘On-Call’ NOT 'On Call’, so that MS logic aligns.

Note: Per MS team, they discussed with SCP on 2/25. They (SCP) have agreed and asked to change the picklist field value from *On Call* to *On-Call* at HC side.

Navigate to Ambrose Campbell.

!image-20260225-141804.png|width=889,alt="image-20260225-141804.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 2 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Covers when HPF 'Ok to Send Rates' is already Checked/True. Update Platform Event = 'HPFUpdate' (updates trigger for the platform event created in 1716 & 4935) - updates in {color:#0747a6}blue{color}
Given I am a Integration User
When a Clinician Contract is ‘Status’ = ‘Executed’
And Employment Type = Employee, Independent Contractor, Partner, Managed, {color:#0747a6}or {color}{color:#0747a6}*Locum*{color}
And system checks the related HPFs
And if the HPF’s 'Ok to Send Rates' = 'Checked/True’
Then the existing platform event = 'HPFUpdate' is triggered for Type = “Rate for HPF”

* HPF Id
* Contract Id = Employment Type = *Facility_Title_**_r.Code_Set_Sub_Type_**_c and Status = Executed*
* Global Provider Id
* Global Facility Id
* Type = “Rate for HPF”



AC2: Covers when HPF 'Ok to Send Rates' is initially Unchecked/False, Need to send once true.
Given I am a Integration User
When a Platform Event in AC1 when was NOT triggered for HPF(s) due to 'Ok to Send Rates' = *'Unchecked/False’*
And via integration HPF ‘Credentialing Status’ = ‘Active’ or ‘Scheduled Pending’
And System updates *'Ok to Send Rates' = 'Checked/True’* (per story 4935)
Then existing platform event = 'HPFUpdate' is triggered for Type = “Rate for HPF”
 25/Feb/26 4:28 PM   4 5874_MulesoftScreenshot1.png 24/Feb/26 12:31 PM SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3) 25/Feb/26 12:18 AM 1|i0mceh: 25/Feb/26 4:28 PM As a system administrator, I want to include Employment Type = Locum, in Platform Event = HPFUpdate for ‘Rate for HPF’, so that information can be sent to Qgenda.



NOTE:

* Per Natalee: Pinky is willing to sign off on a hotfix, need ASAP payroll runs on Friday.
* Natalee, confirmed that adding locum (locum contracts can have rates) will not affect payroll.

Next Steps for SF team:

# Level of effort & Risk? *low for effort and risk*
# When can we fix and push to UAT? *2/25/26 (Wed)*
# Provide Date for Prod release? *Wed or Thursday after SCP tests.*

AC2, AC3, AC4: Update the Record Trigger Flow HPFScheduledPathFlows (remember this flow need to process records in BULK) - Split to [+PR1050558-6260+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6260]

# When HPF Facility Title Employment Type from Code Set = [Locum or Leased or Managed] and “Prescreen Level 2 Completed” != null and isCHGNED from NULL
# Query for User Record for the Clinician Record (from HPF.PractitionerId)
## If User Do Not Exists
### Create the User Records (Do NOT Check: Generate new password and notify user immediately)
#### On Failure of Creation of User Record Create Task as per AC3
#### On Successful user Created send Email as per AC1
### Check for the fields Social Security Number, Zipcode (Mailing Address), Mobile is NUL
#### In ANY Field has NULL: Create Task as per AC4
#### If all fields are available then send the Platform Event ({{Clinician_Onboarding__e}}) with fields as per HPFScheduledPathFlows
## If User Exists and in Active Flag = False
### Update the User to be Active = True
### send Email as per AC1
# Check for the fields Social Security Number, Zipcode (Mailing Address), Mobile is NUL
## In ANY Field has NULL: Create Task as per AC4
## If all fields are available then send the Platform Event ({{Clinician_Onboarding__e}}) with fields as per HPFScheduledPathFlows



AC5: On Closure of Task

* Task Record Type = Default
* Type = Okta Integration Failure (*NEW*)

Trigger a Platform Event {{Clinician_Onboarding__e}} with fields as per HPFScheduledPathFlows 		0 Robert Christensen 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project *AC1:* Update original story 1723 for *mySCP Instructions Email*, update verbiage for Locum, Leased, & Managed ONLY, updates in {color:#403294}purple. {color}_For Employment Type ≠ Locum, Leased, or Managed we should still have email in story:_ [+_PR1050558-1723_+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1723]
Given I am an Active Clinician with a person account record
When a Clinician contract record Status = Executed
{color:#403294}And Contract’s Employment Type = ‘Locum’ or ‘Leased’ or ‘Managed’{color}
{color:#403294}And at least ONE related HPF records has field = ‘Prescreen Level 2 Completed’ populated {color}
Then I receive the following email: -(one email sent per executed contract when user does NOT have a Federation Id)- [covered under [+PR1050558-6295+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6295]]

* Subject: Welcome to SCP Health & [Hospital Name]
* Email body: {color:#403294}See below{color}
* Recipient: person account ‘Email’ field

{color:#403294}And the merge fields in original story 1723 will be used in the email template{color} {color:#403294}below {color}

{color:#403294}+Email template for Locum, Leased or Managed:+{color}

Hi Dr. [Last Name] / Hi [First Name] (for NPPA),

Welcome to SCP Health! {color:#403294}-I’m [CES Name], your Clinician Experience Specialist, and your main point of contact to ensure smooth and stress-free onboarding.-{color}{color:#403294} {color}

What to Expect

1. Activate Your SCP Account
• Look for an email from Okta to set up your account.
• Complete this step within 7 days to access the SCP portal.
•{color:#403294}-If you run into issues, reach out—I’ll help you get unstuck quickly.-{color}{color:#403294} If you run into issues, please contact our help desk at 337.609.1411.{color}

2. Download the mySCP Connect App
• Available on Google Play and Apple App Store
• Enter Organization: SCP
• Log in using your SCP credentials from Step 1

3. Complete Onboarding Requirements
• Available after account activation
• Compliance training will be accessible once your first shift is scheduled and must be completed before working

{color:#403294}-4. Scheduling-{color}{color:#403294} {color}
{color:#403294}-• Once your documents are confirmed, I’ll coordinate your preferences and confirm your start date.-{color}{color:#403294} {color}

{color:#403294}-Need Help?-{color}
{color:#403294}-Primary Contact-{color}{color:#403294} {color}
{color:#403294}-[Your Email]-{color}{color:#403294} {color}
{color:#403294}-[Your Phone Number – text enabled]-{color}{color:#403294} {color}

{color:#403294}-General Support-{color}{color:#403294} {color}
[{color:#403294}-DL.ClinicianExperienceTeam@scphealth.com-{color}|mailto:DL.ClinicianExperienceTeam@scphealth.com]
{color:#403294}-Message us in the mySCP Connect App-{color}{color:#403294} {color}

{color:#403294}-We’re committed to delivering a white glove experience every step of the way.-{color}{color:#403294} {color}
{color:#403294}-— The Clinician Experience Team-{color}

*AC2:* -Auto process for creating a User & trigger Okta Integration- [*Split to* [+PR1050558-6260+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6260]]


*AC3:* -Manual process for creating a User & trigger Okta Integration- [*Split to* [+PR1050558-6260+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6260]]


*AC4*: -Create Task if Platform Event for Okta Integration failed due to missing Clinician Info- [*Split to* [+PR1050558-6260+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6260]]


*AC5:* -Okta Integration updates – Platform Event, Name = Clinician Onboarding-- – *SPLIT to NEW STORY* [+*PR1050558-6237*+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6237]

NOTES:
Data Quality or Clinician Experience Specialist have access to create the User record via ‘Enable Customer User’ button. 		13/Apr/26 3:07 PM   9 5873_6260_6237_Task for Okta Integration_Email.png 24/Feb/26 12:00 PM SCP HC Sprint 14 (Phase 2), SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 15 (Phase 2) 24/Feb/26 4:15 PM 1|i0kny0:zzzi 13/Apr/26 3:07 PM Locums clinicians are receiving welcome emails as intended; however, because they do not complete intakes nor do they provide the necessary information in an agreement- they are reaching out to the CET because they are not receiving okta.

Locums will not have a CES as they should be going through their agency and then to HWL platform for communication. We need to remove them from the welcome email, or find an alternate solution to allow them access to the portal without providing the appropriate level details.

*Business Impact:*

Locum clinicians are confused about the multiple touchpoints, they cannot receive OKTA since they have no info provided, locums are not managed by the CES, and all communication for locum should go through HWL.



*Split story into 3 parts:*

# [+PR1050558-5873+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5873] - Covers AC1 - New mySCP Instruction email template and triggering logic for Employment Type = Locum, Leased, or Managed. *[THIS STORY]*
# [+PR1050558-6260+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6260] - Covers AC2-AC4 - Auto & Manual process for creating a User & trigger Okta Integration. Also covers task creation if Platform Event for Clinician Onboarding is NOT successfully created.
# [+PR1050558-6237+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-6237] - Covers AC5 - Okta Integration updates (Platform Event, Name = Clinician Onboarding)

*Role:* Legal – Client Contracting

*Description:* 

This is related to the compliance team not being able to view conflict of interest (COI) forms. Across the board, we are able to see COI's if they were completed in this new system, but we are unable to see any that were completed prior to go-live. This is causing compliance to be unable to properly review candidates that we hired for February, but it also raises an issue that we cannot go back and view any historical COI data.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

No steps really.. Need to be able to view historical COIs


*Expected vs. Actual:*

Expect to be able to see COIs under files somewhere on the person account, but unable to see

*Record Link:*

1|i0mbrd: 23/Mar/26 10:26 AM *Tester:* Abby Stutes

*Role:* Clinician Experience Specialist

*Description:* 

Clinicians are reaching out because they are not receiving the OKTA email, no in junk or spam either. It appears they are missing one or multiple of the fields required to launch.
Last 4 of SSN:
Zip Code (Mailing Address):
Phone (Any phone number main, home, mobile):
Shouldn't this information auto populate from their intake form? Our team cannot withstand the amount of requests we're going to receive if this is not corrected.

examples:
Dr. Marcus Dubrow
Dr. Ahmed Naffi
Tiffany Leister
Dr. Alfred Nesaraj

*Steps to Reproduce:*

The clinician's Last 4 SSN, Zip Code, and Phone appear to be missing in SF and thus they are not receiving the Okta email.


*Expected vs. Actual:*

Clinician data should be gathered upon intake and auto populated in SF, thus generating an Okta email.

*Record Link:*

 Pratik Kedar 0 Pratik Kedar 2 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 25/Feb/26 11:34 AM   2 24/Feb/26 5:45 AM SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3) 25/Feb/26 4:34 AM We needed to update Condition as per new requirement that instead of running queueable job for not cancelled clinician contract we need to run for *not cancelled and not supplement* Clinician Contract.
Requirements: Changing Requirements
1|i0mbbl: 26/Feb/26 4:32 AM When a PO contract is executed under a Service Account with matching rates and shift types, Given that there are multiple clinician with same & mixed rate clinician contract, then after batch runs, system incorrectly pushes rate updates to *Mixed Rate Clinician contracts* even when those clinicians should be excluded.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

# *Setup:* Ensure a Facility/Service Account has multiple clinicians assigned.
# *Configuration:* Set one clinician to a *Mixed Rate contract* and others to Same rates across shift type.
# *Action:* Create & Execute a PO contract where the *Rate* and *Shift Type* match the existing Service Account criteria.
# *Trigger:* Generate CCM records so that both *Process Type = Automation* and *Process Type = Manual* records exist for the same period.
# Run the batch Clinician coverage batch from Dev console
# *Observation:* Inspect the contract rates for the Clinician on the "Mixed Rate" plan. New Facility Rate is updated on the contract.

*Test evidence:*

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zTELIm8Qj50WxdrUOD-sgGHCE-j2A7s6/view?usp=sharing|https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zTELIm8Qj50WxdrUOD-sgGHCE-j2A7s6/view?usp=sharing|smart-link]

Facility rates are updated on clinician contract for CCM of type = Manual.

 Robert Christensen PR1050558-6107, PR1050558-6108, PR1050558-6192 Adjust the Apex and Omni for Intake for functionality as per AC

ClinicianIntakeFormAssessmentController.cls

Build Question for Omni using the Assessment Questions

Add new Omnis Script for the assessment



The question need to look similar to what we have built today in the new CoreHC in look and feel



For versioning if we can add a note that this version is for 'June 2025' that would be helpful. 		0 Robert Christensen 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Updates story [+PR1050558-1094+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1094], updates the criteria for displaying the following 3 assessments. Updates in blue.
Given I am a Clinician with an open Intake Form case
When I log in to the Core Connect portal
Then I am able to navigate to the Home tab and see the To Do component [Assessment component to launch]
And I can see the following assessments based on my Job’s Service Line and/or my Professional Title (per story [+PR1050558-4973+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-4973])

# Document: 1.5 Certification of Competency (HM-PAPS-Tele-Hospitalist NP-PA)
## Display when:
### Service Line = “Post Acute Provider Services” (_PAPS_), {color:#0747a6}*or “Hospital Medicine” (*{color}{color:#0747a6}*_HM_*{color}{color:#0747a6}*), or “Critical Care (formerly ISV)” (*{color}{color:#0747a6}*_CC_*{color}{color:#0747a6}*)*{color}
AND
### Professional Title = NP or PA
# Document: 1.5 Certification of Competency (HM-PAPS-Tele-Hospitalist Physician)
## Display when:
### Service Line = “Post Acute Provider Services” (_PAPS_), {color:#0747a6}*or “Hospital Medicine” (*{color}{color:#0747a6}*_HM_*{color}{color:#0747a6}*), or “Critical Care (formerly ISV)” (*{color}{color:#0747a6}*_CC_*{color}{color:#0747a6}*)*{color}
AND
### Professional Title = MD or DO
# Document: 1.5 Certification of Competency (Peds HM) {color:#0747a6}--NOTE Part of original story 1094, but ensure we are looking at the correct Service Line{color}
## Display when:
### Service Line = “Pediatric - Hospital Medicine” ({color:#0747a6}*PEDSHM*{color})

AC2: Update Assessment questions
Given I am a Clinician with an open Intake Form case
When I log in to the Core Connect portal
Then I am able to navigate to the Home tab and see the To Do component [Assessment component to launch]
And within the following assessments a *new required question with Initial and Date needs to be added at the end of the assessment* for the ‘June 2025’ version:

# Document: 1.5 Certification of Competency (HM-PAPS-Tele-Hospitalist NP-PA)
# Document: 1.5 Certification of Competency (HM-PAPS-Tele-Hospitalist Physician)
# Document: 1.5 Certification of Competency (Peds HM)

*NEW required ‘Yes’ or ‘No’ question:*

*Do you have or are you able to obtain procedure / case logs showing that you have performed these procedures within the last 2 years?*

* Procedure / Case logs are records that track the number of patients treated and/or procedures performed by a clinician, often used to document competency and meet training requirements. A copy of these logs can be requested from the hospital/employer's medical staff office, quality assurance department, Health Information Management department, or billing office. Typically, these records are only released to the clinician themselves.

*NEW required ‘Initial’ & ‘Date’ needed for this question*

Link to questions: [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tU55QDz-GqwJRIo73ywH_nGGh1BAckZnEfNuNVK_AZU/edit?usp=sharing|https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tU55QDz-GqwJRIo73ywH_nGGh1BAckZnEfNuNVK_AZU/edit?usp=sharing|smart-link]

See tabs:

* 1.5 CoC (HM-PAPS-Tele-Hospitalist NP-PA)
* 1.5 CoC (HM-PAPS-Tele-Hospitalist Physician)
* 1.5 CoC (Peds HM)

----

Screenshot of new question is attached document:

!image-20260302-170513.png|width=961,height=183,alt="image-20260302-170513.png"! 		27/Mar/26 3:05 PM   9 Screenshot 2026-03-24 at 2.44.49 PM.png 23/Feb/26 4:05 PM SCP HC Sprint 14 (Phase 2), SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 13 (Phase 2) 23/Feb/26 4:51 PM 1|i0kny0:x 27/Mar/26 3:05 PM *Tester:* Murphy Alkhatib

*Expected vs. Actual:*

Expect all clinicians to receive Certification of Competency, but not all are

 Robert Christensen PR1050558-6442, PR1050558-6443, PR1050558-6483, PR1050558-6533 +*AC1 -- HR Setup: remove 2 tasks, conditionalize I9 + case creation*+
Flow 1: {{Case_Creation_After_Insert_Flow}}
• Add a new Get Records element: query HealthcarePractitionerFacility where:
• PractitionerId = Clinician's ContactId
• Employment_Type__c = 'Employee'
• Status__c ≠ 'Inactive'
• Status__c ≠ 'Superseded'
• Add a Decision before adding "HR Setup" to subjectListSCP:
• If HPF record found then add "HR Setup" to list
• If NOT found then skip "HR Setup" entirely (no child case, no tasks)

Flow 2: {{Subflow_to_create_Task}}
• +Remove+ the following elements from the HR Setup branch:
• Assign_Task_Fields_for_W2_Completion
• Add_task_record_to_task_list_for_W2_Completion
• Assign_Task_Fields_for_Workday_Termination
• Add_task_record_to_task_list_for_Workday_Termination
• Rewire the HR Setup decision branch to go directly to Assign_Task_Fields_for_I9_Update
• I9 Update is now the only task under HR Setup (no additional condition needed here since the parent case is already gated)

+*AC2 -- Add "Initial Clinician Outreach" to Training & SCP University*+
Flow 2: {{Subflow_to_create_Task}}
• After Add_task_record_to_task_list_for_compliance (end of current Training node), add:
1. New Get Records: query HealthcarePractitionerFacility where:
• PractitionerId = Clinician's ContactId
• Employment_Type__c IN ('Locum', 'Leased', 'Managed')
• Status__c ≠ 'Inactive'
• Status__c ≠ 'Superseded'
2. New Decision: "Has Active Locum/Leased/Managed HPF?"
• If TRUE then skip (back to loop)
• If FALSE then create task
3. New Get Records: query AccountTeamMember where:
• TeamMemberRole = 'Clinician Experience Specialist'
• AccountId = relevant facility account
4. New Assignment: Assign_Task_Fields_for_Initial_Clinician_Outreach
• Subject = 'Initial Clinician Outreach'
• WhatId = Training & SCP University child case Id
• WhoId = Clinician ContactId
• OwnerId = CES Account Team Member UserId (fallback: Case Owner)
• Priority = 'Normal'
• RecordTypeId = Default Task RT
5. New Assignment: Add task to taskList
6. Connector: back to Loop_on_Child_Case

+*AC3 + AC4 -- Legacy records*+
• Inherently covered. Removing task creation logic doesn't affect existing records. No data cleanup. 		0 Robert Christensen 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project *AC1*: For SCP Onboarding’s ‘HR Setup’ child case - remove 2 tasks and update logic for task creation
Given I am a Clinician Experience Specialist (CES) user in the Corporate Support apps
When SCP Onboarding cases are created (either manually by Personas: Medical Staff Liaison, Enrollment Specialist, Data Quality team member via ‘Initiate Early Onboarding’ or automatically when Clinician Contract Status = Executed)
And system creates:

* ‘SCP Onboarding’ Parent Case (already built - [+PR1050558-619+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-619])
** ‘*HR Setup*’ child case (already built - [+PR1050558-619+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-619])

Then the system shall NOT create the following tasks: (business wants to remove tasks since they are handled outside of SF)

* W2 Completion [*REMOVE* task creation]
* Workday Termination [*REMOVE* task creation]

And the *update the existing logic to generate the ‘I9 Update’ task*: (original story - [+PR1050558-559+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-559]+)+

* Only generate when the Clinician’s Employment Type = Employee (if an HPF record exist with Employment Type = Employee And Status not equal to "Inactive" or “Superseded”)

And if *‘I9 Update’ task is NOT generated*, then system shall *automatically Close the ‘HR Setup’ child case with a reason of Canceled.*

*AC2:* Add new task to SCP Onboarding child case = ‘Training / SCP University’
Given I am a Clinician Experience Specialist (CES) user in the Corporate Support apps
When SCP Onboarding cases are created (either manually by Personas: Medical Staff Liaison, Enrollment Specialist, Data Quality team member via ‘Initiate Early Onboarding’ or automatically when Clinician Contract Status = Executed)
And system creates:

* ‘SCP Onboarding’ Parent Case (already built - [+PR1050558-619+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-619])
** ‘*Training & SCP University*’ child case (already built - [+PR1050558-619+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-619])
*** Complete Training (already built - [+PR1050558-559+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-559]+)+
*** Compliance Training (already built - [+PR1050558-559+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-559]+)+

Then a new task ‘Initial Clinician Outreach’ shall be created if the Clinician does not have any active HPF records (Status ≠ ‘Inactive’ or ‘Superseded’) with Employment Type = ‘Locum', 'Leased', or 'Managed’

* Task Record Type = Default
* Subject = Initial Clinician Outreach
* Name = <related Clinician>
* Related To = <Child case = Training & SCP University>
* Assigned To = <Case Owner/Account Team “Clinician Experience Specialist”>
* Priority = Normal

Sharepoint Document, see tab = Clinician Onboarding: [https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/Shared%20Documents/Program%20Documentation/Program%20Execution/1.%20Build,%20QA,%20Refinement/Phase%201/Client%20%26%20Clinician%20Experience/Clinician%20Onboarding_Offboarding%20-%20Cases%20and%20Tasks.xlsx?d=w22ea8633b18a4e0cb5220132e36559eb&csf=1&web=1&e=ue2Lkx|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/Shared%20Documents/Program%20Documentation/Program%20Execution/1.%20Build,%20QA,%20Refinement/Phase%201/Client%20%26%20Clinician%20Experience/Clinician%20Onboarding_Offboarding%20-%20Cases%20and%20Tasks.xlsx?d=w22ea8633b18a4e0cb5220132e36559eb&csf=1&web=1&e=ue2Lkx|smart-link] 		    7 Screenshot 2026-02-23 112647.png 23/Feb/26 12:44 PM SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 15 (Phase 2) 23/Feb/26 2:21 PM 1|i0ma1t: 17/Apr/26 12:18 PM *Tester:* Abby Stutes

*Role:* Clinician Experience Specialist

*Description:* 

The Onboarding cases for new clinicians are assigned to the CES; however; the individual tasks within those cases should be assigned to the appropriate department.

What's happening is that all of the tasks are being assigned to CES. We need to fix this immediately as our other departments responsible are not being informed of these new clinicians.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

W2 completion, I9 update, and workday termination are all HR cases and should be routed appropriately to HR

*Expected vs. Actual:*

The Onboarding cases for new clinicians are assigned to the CES; however; the individual tasks within those cases should be assigned to the appropriate department.

What's happening is that all of the tasks are being assigned to CES. We need to fix this immediately as our other departments responsible are not being informed of these new clinicians.

*Record Link:*  		08/Apr/26

No permission
 Robert Christensen 0 Robert Christensen Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project     3 Screenshot re Status Category Edit Function 2026-02-23.png 23/Feb/26 10:33 AM SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3) 23/Feb/26 10:40 AM 1|i0m9bd: 06/Mar/26 9:09 AM *Tester:* Nicole Fontenot

*Role:* Legal – Client Contracting

*Description:* 

User mistakenly activated an amendment that is not yet signed. When attempting to correct the status from "Executed" back to "Submitted" the system is not permitting the change.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

Need edit functionality for Status and Category post Executed status.

JIRA PR1050558-3351

Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When navigate to a Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
Then I have the ability to select the ‘Activate Contract’ guided experience
Finish/Save
User is returned to the Client Contract
And the system shall make the following updates:
Populate “Activated Date” with current/today’s date
Populate “Activated By” with the user who initiated ‘Activate Contract’
Updates “Status” = “Executed”
And the system shall locate the previous contract in status = Executed (only if it was “Amended” - Previous Contract populated) and make the following update:
Update “Status” = “Superseded”


*Expected vs. Actual:*

Given I am a Legal Team Member within the Corporate Support Apps
When navigate to a Contract (RT: Client Contract) record
Then I have the ability to select the ‘Activate Contract’ guided experience
Finish/Save
User is returned to the Client Contract
And the system shall make the following updates:
Populate “Activated Date” with current/today’s date
Populate “Activated By” with the user who initiated ‘Activate Contract’
Updates “Status” = “Executed”
And the system shall locate the previous contract in status = Executed (only if it was “Amended” - Previous Contract populated) and make the following update:
Update “Status” = “Superseded”

Given I am a Legal Team Member, if the Client Contract is Activated by mistake, then as a Legal Team Member, system will allow manual updates to the Status on the current and previous contract records.

*Record Link:* 

[https://corehc.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800Ps00001F6LF7IAN/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F00137000009qG5EAAU%2Fview|https://corehc.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800Ps00001F6LF7IAN/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F00137000009qG5EAAU%2Fview]

 Robert Christensen PR1050558-6174, PR1050558-6175, PR1050558-6190 Update Flow “Client Contract Review Approval Process”

Remove Step 3 Client Contracting Approval

Ensure the flow from Existing Step 2 Flows to Existing Step 4 after the removal



!image-20260311-122520.png|width=594,alt="image-20260311-122520.png"!


 0 Robert Christensen 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project As a Client Contracting Persona I no longer receive approval requests for Practice Operations Contracts so that I’m not bothered by these, now unnecessary and unwanted, requests. 25/Mar/26 1:40 PM   6 Screenshot 2026-03-24 at 2.48.52 PM.png 20/Feb/26 5:30 PM SCP HC Sprint 14 (Phase 2), SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 13 (Phase 2) 20/Feb/26 5:39 PM 1|i0kny0:zzy 03/Apr/26 12:32 PM *Tester:* Maci Broussard

*Role:* Legal – Client Contracting

*Description:* 

Met with business users: Nicole Fontenot, Jonathan Winarski, Abby Stutes, and Lisa Kleyla. Below is the meeting recap of what was discussed and decision made.

Meeting Purpose: Discuss what involvement Client Contracting is needed for approval of Practice Ops requests, as they’re currently required to approve all submissions.
Meeting Goal: Understand why the decision was made during refinement and what changes are needed.
Decision: Remove Client Contracting from approval process entirely.

Recap:

* Business intention was not to require Client Contracting’s approval on all Practice Ops requests.
* In the past, Client Contracting has been involved in facility changes via Account Mgmt approvals; however, client contract language has changed significantly since that process was put in place and they no longer need to have oversight into these changes.
* Contract changes should be communicated from operators to Client Contracting via email, like all other changes are requested.

*Business Impact:*

Removes an unnecessary approval requirement from Practice Operations approval workflow by removing Client Contracting entirely. Put Medium Priority as until this is done, Client Contracting is approving the requests even though they shouldn't be required to approve. It's not blocking any process. But we did discuss putting this in R3 if possible.

PROD Enhancement: UPHypercare287 - Remove Legal Client Contracting from Practice Operations approval flow

None

3/27 per discussion with Sakthi: For Case RT: Exit Interview, need to update the screen flow = Create Exit Interview Case, How to run the flow, should be set to “System Context with Sharing—Enforces Record-Level Access”. 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Split from: [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5580|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5580|smart-link]


*AC4*: Add History Tracking on Cases (separate story)
Given I am a system administrator within the Corporate Support Apps
When internal Corporate Support Users with access to Cases view a case record type
Then under the ‘Related’ tab, they shall have the ability to view Case History

|*Record Type*|*Tab*|
|Client Agreement Request|*Add* “Related”|
|Client Offboarding|Related|
|Client Onboarding|*Add* “Related”|
|Clinical Match|*Add* “Related”|
|Clinician Change|*Add* “Related”|
|Clinician Intake Form|*Add* “Related”|
|Clinician Offboarding|Related|
|Clinician Onboarding|Related|
|Collaborative Practice Agreement|Related|
|Exit Interview|Related|
|Leadership Change|*Add* “Related”|
|Rate Approval|Related|
|Risk Review|*Add* “Related”|
|Support|*Add* “Related”|

And the following field shall be tracked:

* Account
* HPF
* Case Origin
* Case Owner
* Case Reason
* Case Record Type
* Contact Name
* Last Day
* Offboarding Decision
* Priority
* Status
* Subject
* Type
* Description (track changes only) 		08/Apr/26 11:43 AM   9 Screenshot 2026-04-07 at 1.22.52 PM.png 20/Feb/26 4:17 PM SCP HC Sprint 14 (Phase 2), SCP HC Sprint 12.5 (R3), SCP HC Sprint 13 (Phase 2), SCP HC Sprint 12.3 (R1), SCP HC Sprint 15 (Phase 2) 03/Mar/26 10:05 PM 1|i0knxx: 08/Apr/26 11:43 AM *Tester:* Kristin Koide

*Role:* IT

*Description:* 

Per story PR1050558-2473, the system should update the HPF to Status = 'Inactive' on the 'Effective To' date.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

1. Persona: MSL, Clinician Experience Specialist, or Data Quality team initiates the 'Initiate Termination Request' from a clinician record.
2. in the 'Initiate Termination Request' guided experience select full SCP termination and ensure that 'Last Day' is in the future. (ex. 3/1/2026)
2. First ensure that the Facility Offboarding tasks are completed and case is closed
3. then ensure that the SCP Offboarding tasks are complete and case is closed with Offboarding Decision: Confirmed Exit


*Expected vs. Actual:*

Expected Result: system should update the HPF record fields when Effective To is in the past)

Status = Inactive
Contracting Status = Terminated
Termination Date = day automation ran

Actual Results: HPF record updates are happening immediately instead of happening on the 'Effective To' Date:
HPF updates (occur when Effective To is in the past)

Status = Inactive
Contracting Status = Terminated
Termination Date = day automation ran

*Record Link:* 

Not Provided

AC2 A Permission Set Named “Create and Manage Public Reports” is available to be assigned to users and the listed system permission are set to true

AC3 Both Permissions Sets named above are visible in the “Permission Sets In This Group” section of the “Health Cloud Restricted User Group” Permission Set Group

*Creations of two Reporting Permission Sets*

1. *Name: Create and Manage Personal Reports*
Create and Customize Reports = TRUE
Create Report Folders = TRUE
Export Reports = TRUE
Edit My Reports = TRUE
Report Builder (Lightning Experience) = TRUE


# *Name: Create and Manage Public Reports*

Schedule Reports = TRUE
Subscribe to Reports = TRUE
Subscribe to Reports: Add Recipients = TRUE
Subscribe to Reports: Send to Groups and Roles = TRUE

## Add Permission Set: Risk Management
# HPF Layout, make new section read only, except for Permission Set Group = 'Data Quality' and ‘Risk Management Group’. 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Update HPF layout - Add Section = “Insurance Information”
Given I am a system administrator within the Corporate Support apps
When an internal Corporate Support user with access to HPF (Healthcare Practitioner Facility) *views* a record
Then they will see a new section = “Insurance Information” above “Additional QGenda Data”
And within the new section = “Insurance Information”, I can see the following fields:

* Insurance Provided By
* Certificate of Insurance Start
* Certificate of Insurance Expiration

And the fields listed above are NO longer listed in the “Additional QGenda Data” section.


AC2: *Edit* access on section = “Insurance Information” for ONLY users with Permission Set Group = 'Data Quality' and ‘Risk Management Group’
Given I am a user in the Corporate Support app
And I have Permission Set Group = 'Data Quality' OR ‘Risk Management Group’
When I am on a HPF record
Then I can edit the following fields within section = “Insurance Information”:

* Insurance Provided By
* Certificate of Insurance Start
* Certificate of Insurance Expiration


NOTE for AC2: if the user does not have the Permission Set Group = 'Data Quality' and ‘Risk Management Group’, then they should NOT be able to edit the fields listed in AC2



----

Refinement ONLY NOTES:
In Prod, Caleb & Kerrie are setup as a combination of MSL & Restricted User. Validated that in UAT with this setup for Caleb and can edit the HPF record, so when we move these fields out of the read only section, then anyone with access to edit the HPF can edit these fields too. We already have history tracking enabled for these fields as well.

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-5832, PR1050558-5833 -TBD - on permission set =- *-Health Cloud Restricted User - Corporate Support Permission-*-, Add “Edit” to Account object-. – *REMOVE Access, will implement new permission set as part of* [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5823|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-5823|smart-link] 0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Add Team Role = “Risk Management”

# with a user with the Persona = MSL (edit access on account), to ensure they too have edit access on the above mentioned fields.

NOTE: Data Quality is the persona that manages Account Team members. *Role:* Clinician Contracting Specialist

*Description:* 

After sending the agreement in DocuSign, the agreement is not moving status from "Ready for Signatures" to "Other Party Signatures."

*Steps to Reproduce:*

After sending the agreement in DocuSign, the agreement is not moving status from "Ready for Signatures" to "Other Party Signatures" as it should. The sent date did populate and I verified that the DocuSign was indeed sent.

 Robert Christensen PR1050558-6104, PR1050558-6117, PR1050558-6188 As a Clincian Contacting Specialist I can view a list view of Tasks called “Transition Specialist Queue” that shows the name of Task.WhatID.Case.ContactName

*SOLUTION:*

Update Task creation for tasks “Update Records and Notify Teams” and “Employee Review” to include WhoID as well as WhatID on creation. WhoID should be populated with the related Case.ContactName


Flow: CaseCreationAfterFlow
SubFlow: Create_Task_for_SCP_Offboarding_Cases


Add WhoID assignment to the following TaskFieldAssignment elements
Is SCP Offboarding Decision Path:
- Assign Task Fields for Employee Review
- Assign Task Fields for Conduct Stay Interview / Offer Stay Incentive
- Assign Task Fields for Exit Interview
- RN/LPN Manager Assign Task Fields for Exit Interview
- Regional Medical Officer Assign Task Fields for Exit Interview
- Assign Task Fields for Compensation Recoupment

Is Facility Offboarding Decision Path:
- Assign Task Fields for CPA Review
- Assign Task Fields for Review Contract for Termination for other Employee Type
- Assign Task Fields for QGenda Credentialling Inactivation
- Assign Task Fields for Update Malpractice Insurance
- Assign Task Fields for Compensation Recoupment 2

On each assignment element Add
*{!taskObj.WhoId} = {!Loop_on_Offboarding_SCP_Cases.AccountId}* for the SCP Client Cases

OR

*{!taskObj.WhoId} = {!Loop_on_Offboarding_Facility_Cases.AccountId}* for the Facility Offboarding Cases
to each element above.

*Role:* Clinician Contracting Specialist

*Description:* 

The view of the Transition Specialist Queue is set up with a column for the Clinician's name. However, the values are empty such that we cannot tell which clinician each offboarding case relates to. This fix would be particularly helpful in being able to identify which cases/tasks need to be worked on collectively.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

The view of the Transition Specialist Queue is set up with a column for the Clinician's name. However, the values are empty such that we cannot tell which clinician each offboarding case relates to. This fix would be particularly helpful in being able to identify which cases/tasks need to be worked on collectively.


*Expected vs. Actual:*

The Clinician Name should be visible in the Name column

*Record Link:* 

[https://corehc.lightning.force.com/lightning/o/Case/list?filterName=Transition_Specialist_Queue_Case|https://corehc.lightning.force.com/lightning/o/Case/list?filterName=Transition_Specialist_Queue_Case]
